channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-31 09:58 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: In 4 or 5 years, there will be a launch every hour
item.description: In 4 or 5 years, there will be a launch every hour

item.title: @elonmusk: テスラのFSD自動運転で新宿駅前を通る。日本🇯🇵でも今年認可され、イーロンがポストしていたように日本のサービス拠点やスーパーチャージャーへの投資が加速すると一気にメジャーな車になるだろう。
item.description: テスラのFSD自動運転で新宿駅前を通る。日本🇯🇵でも今年認可され、イーロンがポストしていたように日本のサービス拠点やスーパーチャージャーへの投資が加速すると一気にメジャーな車になるだろう。

item.title: @elonmusk: Teslas are in tunnels under Vegas transporting millions of people
item.description: Teslas are in tunnels under Vegas transporting millions of people

item.title: @elonmusk: Best value out there by far. I won’t let my family drive anything else.
item.description: Best value out there by far. I won’t let my family drive anything else.

item.title: @elonmusk: 東京都在住の方が、今Teslaを購入すると、国の補助金127万円に加えて、東京都から40万円(最大80万円)の補助金を受け取ることができます。
item.description: 東京都在住の方が、今Teslaを購入すると、国の補助金127万円に加えて、東京都から40万円(最大80万円)の補助金を受け取ることができます。

item.title: @elonmusk: Carrousel of the sky, Grok Imagine ✨️
item.description: Carrousel of the sky, Grok Imagine ✨️

item.description: O C C U P Y M A R S 🔴 🚀 . . . . . . . . . . 💥 🌏

item.title: @elonmusk: Imagine is positive gross margin for xAI!
item.description: Imagine is positive gross margin for xAI!

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagineは、多言語での動画生成に非常に優れています。
item.description: Grok Imagineは、多言語での動画生成に非常に優れています。

item.title: @elonmusk: Ready to bring ideas to life? Try Grok Imagine today
item.description: Ready to bring ideas to life? Try Grok Imagine today

item.title: @elonmusk: Tap the Grok logo on the upper right of any post for analysis
item.description: Tap the Grok logo on the upper right of any post for analysis

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine "extend from frame" 30 second continuous video.💫
item.description: Grok Imagine "extend from frame" 30 second continuous video.💫

item.title: @elonmusk: Here’s what Grok can do • Talk about anything: ask real questions, get honest answers, almost zero b...
item.description: Here’s what Grok can do • Talk about anything: ask real questions, get honest answers, almost zero boring policy warnings • Search super fast: latest news, 𝕏 posts, or the whole web in seconds • Run code live: math, science, data, games, whatever… solved on the spot • Create pictures and videos: just describe an idea and it’ll make (or edit) image or clip • Handle real life: brainstorm businesses, study help, stock advice, savage roasts • Real-time & fun: generate memes, vulgarly roast someone (with their photo), bedtime stories, you name it Like a super smart friend who actually gets it Try it@Grok🔥

item.title: @elonmusk: Nvidia CEO Jensen “@Teslastack is the most advanced autonomous vehicle stack in the world. I’m fairl...
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen “@Teslastack is the most advanced autonomous vehicle stack in the world. I’m fairly certain they were already using end-to-end AI. Whether their AI did reasoning or not in somewhat secondary to that first part.”
